name: Pecan Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Yogurt, plain or sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Set aside about 1/4 cup of flour.
4. Combine remaining flour and baking soda; add to creamed mixture alternately with yogurt, beating well after each addition.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Dredge pecans in reserved flour, then fold into batter.
7. Spoon batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan or Bundt pan.
8. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1-1/2 hours.
9. Cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
